methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The BLACK token balance of the VotingEscrow contract must exactly equal the total supply of locked tokens minus the tokens burned for smNFTs.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract balance is less than the expected supply, users will be unable to withdraw their locked tokens upon expiration, leading to insolvency and loss of funds. If it is greater, tokens are leaking into the contract.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_ve_solvency() public view { assert(IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) == supply - smNFTBalance); }

invariants.description: The global total voting weight across all pools must equal the sum of the weights allocated to each individual pool.
invariants.attack_scenario: If total weight is less than the sum of pool weights, the voting power is artificially inflated, allowing attackers to direct more emissions than they should be able to, stealing yield from legitimate pools.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_voter_weight_conservation() public view { uint256 sum; for(uint i=0; i<pools.length; i++) sum += weights[pools[i]]; assert(totalWeight == sum); }

invariants.description: The used weight of a specific veNFT must equal the sum of the weights it has allocated to all pools.
invariants.attack_scenario: If used weight is less than the sum of allocated weights, a user could double-spend their voting power across multiple pools, manipulating emissions and extracting excess bribes.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_user_weight_conservation(uint256 tokenId) public view { uint256 sum; for(uint i=0; i<poolVote[tokenId].length; i++) sum += votes[tokenId][poolVote[tokenId][i]]; assert(usedWeights[tokenId] == sum); }

invariants.description: The total supply of staked voting power in the bribe contract must exactly equal the sum of all individual staked balances.
invariants.attack_scenario: If total supply is manipulated or desyncs from individual balances, the reward distribution math will be skewed, allowing yield theft or trapping rewards in the contract permanently.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_bribe_supply_conservation() public view { /* sum over all tokenIds */ assert(totalSupply == sum_balances); }

invariants.description: The token balance of the RewardsDistributor must be at least the token_last_balance which tracks the undistributed tokens.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the balance is less than token_last_balance, the contract is insolvent and users will not be able to claim their rebases, leading to a loss of earned yield.

invariants.description: The remaining reward amount for a season must not exceed the total reward amount, and the contract must hold enough tokens to pay out the remaining rewards.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract doesn't hold enough tokens, legitimate claimants will be unable to claim their seasonal rewards, resulting in a denial of service and loss of user funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_claims_solvency() public view { assert(season.remaining_reward_amount <= season.reward_amount); assert(IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this)) >= season.remaining_reward_amount); }
